name: Blizzarmon

signature_move.name: Avalanche Step
signature_move.description: Wields its two tomahawks, "Éji" and "Ōji", to chop up the opponent like it was dancing.

description: A Digimon that possesses power over Ice, and bears the might of one of the legendary Warrior Ten . Although its behaviour is better described as recklessness rather than dauntless courage, it is in any case a ruffian overflowing with enthusiasm and ambition. It is extremely curious, loves being in the limelight, and tends to get carried away. Even during battle, it gets up to humorous antics such as striking a pose while offering a prayer unto the god of ice and snow it follows, or calling out the names of its Special Moves. In actuality, however, it is also closely observing the opponent and terrain, with its astuteness letting it gain the upper hand in battle. Its Special Moves are wielding its two tomahawks, " Éji " and " Ōji ", to chop up the opponent with dance-like motions ( Avalanche Step ), and restricting the opponent's movement with the extensible hair on its head, then finishing them off with the blades on the hair tips ( Gletscher Torpedo ).
